ec2.customer.gateway.BgpAsn.Docs: For devices that support BGP, the customer gateway's BGP ASN.  Default: 65000

ec2.customer.gateway.IpAddress.Docs: The Internet-routable IP address for the customer gateway's outside interface. The address must be static.

ec2.customer.gateway.Tags.Docs: One or more tags for the customer gateway.

ec2.customer.gateway.Type.Docs: The type of VPN connection that this customer gateway supports (`ipsec.1`).
